title: Battle of Bakura (disambiguation)
content:
Throughout its history, the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] experienced several battles:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Battle on Bakura]]''', a battle involving the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]==
'''[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]'''
:*[[Battle of Bakura (Clone Wars)|Battle of Bakura]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]
'''[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]'''
:*[[Raid at Bakura]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]
'''[[Ssi-ruuvi invasions]]'''
:*[[Invasion of Bakura]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]
:*[[Battle of Bakura]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]
'''[[Ssi-ruuvi invasions]]'''/'''[[Yuuzhan Vong War]]'''
:*[[Battle of Bakura (28 ABY)|Battle of Bakura]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]

The term "Battle of Bakura" could also apply to two significant [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] missions to Bakura which involved violent altercations:
*A [[Mission to Bakura (Clone Wars)|Mission to Bakura]] by [[Sora Bulq/Legends|Sora Bulq]] and [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
*A [[Mission to Bakura (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)|Mission to Bakura]] by [[Jaden Korr]] during the crisis of the [[Disciples of Ragnos]].

{{Disambig}}

|de=Schlacht um Bakura
